name: recoil_app_shutdown_subsystems
description: RecoilApp::ShutdownSubsystems invokes the input, image, ZRDR, video scratch, effects, option catalog, class, model display, sound, and ZRDR node-pool shutdown fan-out, then returns through the final node-pool cleanup tail call.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /DUINT_PTR=UINT /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ShutdownSubsystems@RecoilApp@@SAHXZ at 0x442bc0 still fails: 4 unmasked mismatches, 44 relocation bytes masked, 6 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 55 bytes, VC object symbol size 64 bytes.

Cold-calling the aggregate wrapper is not runtime-safe in the native smoke harness because several subsystem globals require initialized provider state. The functional target verifies every direct shutdown dependency and records the wrapper byte-compare failure.
